title: <div>  •  The Seven Hermetic Principles (Domain: Occult Philosophy) – A set of u
content: <div>  •  The Seven Hermetic Principles (Domain: Occult Philosophy) – A set of universal laws articulated in The Kybalion (1908), attributed to ancient Hermetic wisdom. They are: Mentalism (“All is Mind; the Universe is mental.” reality is akin to a thought), Correspondence (“As above, so below; as below, so above.” mirroring across planes), Vibration (“Nothing rests; everything moves; everything vibrates.” all things are in constant motion at some frequency), Polarity (“Everything is dual; everything has poles.” opposites are extremes of the same thing), Rhythm (“Everything flows, out and in; all things rise and fall.” cyclic movement in all things), Cause and Effect (“Every cause has its effect; every effect has its cause.” nothing happens by chance), Gender (“Gender is in everything; everything has masculine and feminine principles.” creative forces are expressed as a gendered polarity in all planes)【0†L1-L3】【0†L5-L8】. Examples:Mentalism – in New Thought or “law of attraction” circles, this is interpreted as mind influencing reality (e.g., visualization affecting outcomes). Polarity – love and hate are extremes of emotion; transmuting one to the other is possible by changing vib
